title: assassin kit
description: this mod try's to add assassin gear and feeling to minecraft, so you can feel like a true assassin in the game!
body:
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e049503c98bb6e0ba24f3ed1a9064e2e32311e1.png)

with this mod you can feel like a real assassin in minecraft, you will have throwing knvies and assassin daggers so you can use in combat to assassinate other players or mobs!
